title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 10th April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: On a good uptrend; add on declines, not in the run-up; shows strength when market settles.
recommendations.detail: All three (Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors CV/PV, Ola Electric) on a good uptrend, no doubt. Ashok Leyland shows strength when the market settles a bit; add it on declines.

recommendations.note: On a good uptrend; add on declines for the long term.
recommendations.detail: One of the three auto names on a good uptrend; advised adding on declines rather than in the current run-up. Cautioned against an all-automobile concentrated portfolio.

recommendations.note: His dark-horse pick but already ran up ~25-30%; buy on dips, not in the run-up.
recommendations.detail: Was one of his dark-horse picks for the workshop but already rose ~25-30% before it (good buy at 28-29; 'something is cooking', corporate-level changes). Don't buy in the current run-up; buy when it dips.

recommendations.note: Decent but fully-priced; add for long term expecting only ~10-15% CAGR.
recommendations.detail: Decent stock, can add for the long term, but it's a fully-priced-in stock; invest expecting ~10-15% CAGR returns.

recommendations.note: Decent but fully-priced; add for long term expecting only ~10-15% CAGR.
recommendations.detail: Decent stock, can add for the long term, but fully-priced-in; invest expecting ~10-15% CAGR returns.

recommendations.note: Good momentum, near all-time high; gave great returns even in weak markets.
recommendations.detail: Good momentum; in last few days came close to all-time high (high 433, ~425). Buy was advised even on 200-pt dips; gave great returns in weak markets. Hold.

recommendations.note: Company has become erratic; results don't tally; exit on rallies.
recommendations.detail: Company very erratic, one result doesn't tally with another and it keeps behaving that way; if you ask me, exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Better than SJVN/IDFC First; will outperform; good switch.
recommendations.detail: Approved switching out of SJVN and IDFC First into GMR Airports and Jio Finance; both are better stocks and will outperform.

recommendations.note: Better than SJVN/IDFC First; will outperform; good switch.
recommendations.detail: Approved switching out of SJVN and IDFC First into GMR Airports and Jio Finance; both are better stocks and will outperform.

recommendations.note: Exit (held 2 yrs, 38% loss) and switch into GMR Airports / Jio Finance.
recommendations.detail: Caller holding 2 years at 38% loss; Kutumba Rao said the exit idea is good, switch into the better-performing GMR Airports / Jio Finance.

recommendations.note: Exit (held 2 yrs, 5% loss) and switch into GMR Airports / Jio Finance.
recommendations.detail: Caller holding 2 years at 5% loss; Kutumba Rao endorsed exiting and switching into the better stocks GMR Airports / Jio Finance.

recommendations.note: NSE SME; hold for now but exit on any rally; SME space in a pitiable state.
recommendations.detail: NSE SME stock; results okay-ish; hold for now but exit whenever a rally comes. SME space brought to a pitiable state by exchanges/SEBI; even genuinely-performing SMEs have no patronage now.
